notes: MODULES screen redesign — picked variants from the v0.15.4 mockups. Library tiles are now HEX badges in a 4-column grid with rarity shown as a glowing dot (text never overflows). Slot picker is a SIDE DOCK that slides in from the right while the ship blueprint stays visible behind it. COSMETICS rebuilt as a 4-tab live composite preview (SHIP / PROJECTILE / TRAIL / SHIELD) — the ship is drawn with the real in-game texture, projectiles stream up using the active projectile shape + color, the trail uses active_trail_color(), the shield ring pulses with active_shield_color(). Click any skin in the right list and the preview updates instantly. Bugs fixed: rarity badges never spill out of their containers, slot X-button has a bigger hit area and swallows clicks before drag, single-click in the library equips, and filter-chip count badges sit inside the chip.
launcher_notes: Rename-first self-update — fixes the infinite-update loop on Windows (Defender was blocking the old del+copy flow, and the bat retry counter never incremented). Failed swaps now auto-restore from backup. CLASSES roster panel removed from left side.
